notes:
v1.2.0 — Glyph Puzzles, Combination Locks & Preset System
✨ New Features:
• Glyph Mode: Trace magic circles by hand to unlock rewards. Includes multiple layers, custom colors, and spectator support.
• Combination Lock: Fully interactive mechanical safe with rotating number dials, secret codes, and momentum physics.
• Preset System: Save unboxing setups as presets. Export/import setups (ZIP) and gacha pools (JSON) between worlds.
• Interaction Range: Set a maximum distance in grid squares for puzzle interaction.
⚡ Improvements:
• Faster gacha config loading (100+ items) and smooth marquee scrolling for featured items.
🐛 Bug Fixes:
• Fixed unclaimable gacha results and spectator sync for new puzzle types.

announcement.title: 🎁 Unboxing the Mystery v1.2.0
announcement.content:
v1.2.0 — Glyph Puzzles, Combination Locks & Preset System

  • 🪄 Glyph Mode: Trace intricate magic circles by hand to unlock hidden rewards.
  • 🔐 Combination Lock: Fully interactive mechanical safe with rotating number dials and momentum physics.
  • 📦 Preset System & Portability: Save configurations as reusable presets. Export/import setups and gacha pools between worlds.
  • 📏 Interaction Range: Set a maximum distance for players to interact with puzzles.
  • ⚡ Improvements: Faster gacha config loading (100+ items) and smooth marquee scrolling for featured items.
  • 🐛 Bug Fixes: Resolved gacha claim UI issues and spectator sync bugs.
